raw_entries.text: Match ends, Ecuador 2, Germany 1.
Second Half ends, Ecuador 2, Germany 1.
Gonzalo Plata (Ecuador) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Foul by Pascal Groß (Germany).
Attempt missed. Pascal Groß (Germany) left footed shot from outside the box is too high.
Attempt missed. Deniz Undav (Germany) left footed shot from a difficult angle on the left is close, but misses to the left. Assisted by Pascal Groß.
Fourth official has announced 7 minutes of added time.
Foul by Gonzalo Plata (Ecuador).
Jamal Musiala (Germany) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Gonzalo Plata (Ecuador) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

Maximilian Beier (Germany) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Foul by Kevin Rodríguez (Ecuador).
Malick Thiaw (Germany) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Substitution, Ecuador. Félix Torres replaces John Yeboah.
Substitution, Ecuador. Jordy Caicedo replaces Nilson Angulo because of an injury.
Handball by Kevin Rodríguez (Ecuador).
Pedro Vite (Ecuador) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Maximilian Beier (Germany).
Attempt blocked. Kevin Rodríguez (Ecuador) left footed shot from very close range is blocked. Assisted by John Yeboah with a headed pass.
Corner, Ecuador. Conceded by Angelo Stiller.
Goal! Ecuador 2, Germany 1. Gonzalo Plata (Ecuador) left footed shot from very close range to the top right corner. Assisted by Kevin Rodríguez with a headed pass following a corner.
Attempt saved. Leroy Sané (Germany) left footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Hernán Galíndez (Ecuador). Assisted by Deniz Undav.
Jamal Musiala (Germany) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt missed. Gonzalo Plata (Ecuador) left footed shot from very close range is high and wide to the right. Assisted by Moisés Caicedo.
Substitution, Germany. Pascal Groß replaces Florian Wirtz.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Ecuador. Pervis Estupiñán replaces Piero Hincapié because of an injury.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Nilson Angulo (Ecuador) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Foul by Malick Thiaw (Germany).
Substitution, Ecuador. Kevin Rodríguez replaces Enner Valencia.
Substitution, Ecuador. Ángelo Preciado replaces Alan Franco.
Substitution, Germany. Maximilian Beier replaces Felix Nmecha.
Attempt blocked. Florian Wirtz (Germany) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Deniz Undav.
Attempt saved. Enner Valencia (Ecuador) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Manuel Neuer (Germany). Assisted by John Yeboah.
Substitution, Germany. Deniz Undav replaces Kai Havertz.
Substitution, Germany. Malick Thiaw replaces Joshua Kimmich.

Attempt missed. Moisés Caicedo (Ecuador) header from a difficult angle on the left is close, but misses to the left. Assisted by John Yeboah with a cross following a corner.
Alan Franco (Ecuador) is shown the yellow card.
Joel Ordóñez (Ecuador) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Foul by David Raum (Germany).
VAR Decision: No Penalty Germany.
Substitution, Germany. Angelo Stiller replaces Aleksandar Pavlovic.
Second Half begins Ecuador 1, Germany 1.
First Half ends, Ecuador 1, Germany 1.
